description: Documented known-limitation of the v0.15.2 jwt-detector: JWT-shape credentials split across multiple string-literals and joined via `+`-concatenation break the continuous `eyJ…`-shape regex match. The SAST-scanner reads source-text and each concat-segment is its own quoted string, so the regex's `{15,}`-anchor cannot reach across quote-boundaries. Detector must NOT emit on this shape — a SECRET-JWT finding here would be inaccurate since the detector cannot confirm a full-JWT-at-rest without AST-level concat-reconstruction (deferred to v0.16). Round-3 external review adversarial probe A1b graded this as a D-class known-bypass.
